raw_data.address: 3908 E Franklin Blvd Suite F120, Gastonia, NC 28056
raw_data.name: RnR Café & Gifts

reviews_data.review_text:
We drove 20 minutes from Stanley just to get my daughter a drink. We arrived at 6:24 and the store was closed with a worker inside, even though the hours listed online and also the hours posted on the door say open til 7.
I asked the employee “arent you guys open until 7?”
And I got a very low grumble response of “uuuh, we close early. Sorry.”

We won’t be back
super chill place, food is alright, boba is really good, I went here with my newborn and wife, and the vibe was just right! they have chess and jenga, so that was nice
fue la primer vez que visite este lugar y la verdad me encantó, la atención es excelente definitivamente se volvió el lugar favorito para mis hijas por que amamos los boba tea.  Lo recomiendo al 100%

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing drink flights 🤩

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Haniya, sorry for the experience you had. The empty space is for when you poke the straw through, it won't splash on you. We use fresh milk and fresh tea with a little bit of flavoring powder and syrup. We will make sure that the drinks are prepared better. Always come back same day and let us know so we can remake it right for you!
reviews_data.review_text: I ordered a milk based drink and got a huge clump of unmixed dry mix in my mouth and lining the rim of the cup there were many more clumps of drink mix, and the cup wasn't even filled all the way there was half and inch of empty space at the top.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting our cafe! So glad our team have made it an incredible experience for you. We hope to see you back again!
reviews_data.review_text: Samantha, maria and helena were so friendly make the environment very warm and comfortable, the drinks i got were so good im definitely coming back!!! ☺️

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Julie, sorry for the experience you had. We will work with our supplier for better product quality control.
reviews_data.review_text: I ordered a chicken salad croissant.  It took longer than I expected, to get the sandwich. I ate a few bites, and kept finding hair. I was refunded the cost of the sandwich, but not the canned soda I bought with it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Sofia, sorry for the experience you had. We will do better in training new employees. Your feedback and experience is important to us. We hope to see you back for a fresh season!
reviews_data.review_text: I actually just left their location. This would’ve been my second time getting a drink from them, but the service just doesn’t seem to be a priority in there. This time I walked in I was expected to hopefully be greeted by someone when I walked in, but I was waiting for the lady to finish making. I assume the other people’s drinks that were in there it was just one family she didn’t say hello. She didn’t even look towards me. she shouldn’t say I’ll be right with you. I was just standing there for about six minutes and nothing so I felt like I was wasting my time at that point so I give it to you because I know their drink was good the first time I tried it, but the whole experience just made me walk out this time because I have worked at a coffee shop before and can’t stand when employees are like this.

reviews_data.owner_answer: So glad you were able to check out our location. Hope to see you back for our next promotion!
reviews_data.review_text: Took my boba obsessed kids here. They loved it. The girl behind the counter was very helpful and talked to them about what flavors that liked/wanted. My oldest said we will definitely be coming back lol

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting us! Glad you enjoyed the biscoff frappe made with locally roasted organic coffee! We will have more new drinks for spring soon! Come back for a new treat!
reviews_data.review_text: got the biscoff frappe and it was delicious my only issue was it's kinda expensive so definitely a place for a treat not a daily thing

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your feedback. We are there everyday and usually have 2 staff overlapping. We haven't experienced any rude customers. Everyone who come by are really the best customers. We hope to see you back for Valentine's Day promotion this weekend!
reviews_data.review_text:
The staff here, absolutely amazing and so is the food!!

But it’s truly concerning how the owners only have 1 associate working at a time! Watching one person run the POS AND be responsible for cooking the food and making the drinks with zero support while dealing with customers being rude to them is truly disheartening. OWNERS DO BETTER!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your visit! Glad you enjoyed our matcha and the setup!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing matchas! I haven’t tried the coffee yet, but I can bet it’s just as good as the matcha. I love the set up inside- fun and welcoming.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We have smoothies and refresher lemonade that don't have tea or any caffeine in it! Try our world trophy smoothies or lychee berry lemonade!
reviews_data.review_text: I wish they had boba drinks without tea.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Come on Tuesdays! We have 10% off :)
reviews_data.review_text: The best taro boba I’ve tasted me and my husband love it. Staff is so nice also!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you and your family enjoyed your time here with us! We will have more boba choices soon!
reviews_data.review_text: The best place I've ever been to for bobba. Service 100% deserves the most recognition. I came by myself to get my wife a drink as a surprise and came back 10 minutes later to get me and my kids one. My wife and I will be back for sure!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you had a great experience! We will have more gifts and drinks to try!
reviews_data.review_text: I stopped in and tried the brown sugar boba tea float and it was absolutely delicious. The flavor was rich and smooth, and the boba had the perfect texture. The shop itself is beautifully decorated and has such a warm, inviting vibe. I also loved browsing the adorable little gifts they had on display, and the claw prize machines were a fun surprise. Overall, a great place to treat yourself. I will definitely be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Mucho gracias!
reviews_data.review_text: Excelente son bueno pase un rato agradable la música suave veía el cielo podía meditar no había bulla me gustó 🔥😮‍💨🥰🥰volveré otro día lo recomiendo puedes pasar a leer un libro una tarde. Si quieres.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by and providing positive feedback for improvement. Our staff is still new and in training. Glad you liked the cheesecake!
reviews_data.review_text: Employee here extremely slow, not busy as at all & very few customers. Took 10 mins to even get a hello while she was stocking or something of that nature and then just sloooooow motion for every drink she was making. Very short when speaking to people, drinks were made poorly and did not taste right so had to ask to do over as just did not taste right. Inside of place is nice looking, also got a cheesecake cupcake that was good but drinks not great and expensive for what you get.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you enjoyed your experience here with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Service and drinks were great!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by! Hope to see yall again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a cute shop! Yummy food and lots of good blind boxes, gifts and even Labubus. I got the hello kitty ice cream it was adorable. The owner is super sweet, highly recommend!😊

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Rylan, sorry about the experience you had. We had an unexpected crowd while our new staff are in training. If you are open to scheduling online order for a pickup, we can have it ready at your desired time.
To place pickup order:
http://rnr-cafe-nc.square.site/
reviews_data.review_text: Took over an hour to get a 7 dollar drink.

reviews_data.review_text: Fam it took nearly an hour for one drink 😟

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the positive feedback! This encourage our team to continue providing great service.
reviews_data.review_text: It's so cute and it's so good!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We apologize that the banh mi was not what you expected. Please come see us and we can make it the way that you like!
reviews_data.review_text: The drinks are good however I was disappointed in the Banh mi sandwich. The sandwich was not warm, the bread was hard, and the pork was like eating beef jerky. I purchased one for me and my coworker and we were both disappointed.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the visiting our shop! We have added new menu items for fall!
reviews_data.review_text: Cute place! Offers a little bit of everything from spring rolls, sliders to acai bowks!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you had a great experience with our desserts, cafe and staff! It means a lot to our staff and small business to be a part of Gastonia!
reviews_data.review_text: If you haven’t been to R&R cafe PLEASE DO! The cheesecake is AMAZING!!! And the atmosphere is soo cute and the employees are so helpful!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the positive feedback! We have new menu items for fall along with different promotions everyday!
reviews_data.review_text: great place great energy and great vibes

reviews_data.owner_answer:
We love the matcha milk tea too! :) 
Thank you for stopping by. Hope to see you again soon for our fall events!
reviews_data.review_text: My matcha milk tea was fast and delicious and it’s a super cute little spot! Love all the cute desserts and hello kitty stuff

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you enjoyed the drinks and desserts! We have more promotions and events coming up!
reviews_data.review_text:
Such a cute spot with unique little drinks and desserts! Was so hard to choose from! Customer service was amazing 💕

Sorry ate some of the ice cream

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! Come see us again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Place looks awesome!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad to have you check out our spot. See us again soon for more events!
reviews_data.review_text: cutest boba shop ever! great food and even greater drinks! service was good as well!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! Glad you liked our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Muy rico 😋 y buena bebidas

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you liked the drinks and cheesecake! Have you tried our fall brunch menu yet?? Come try it soon before our new holiday menu! 😀
reviews_data.review_text: The drinks and the cheesecake is very good I don’t understand how they don’t have a line out the door !!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by! Have you tried our fall brunch menu and new kpop merchandise?? :)
reviews_data.review_text: First time here! You can sing, eat dessert, have some drink, play games and also take beautiful photos! Here is amazing! I bet you will love here!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We have a wider fall brunch menu with more banh mi selections! Come check us out!
reviews_data.review_text: Very cute cafe that has boba tea and some desserts as well as some banh mi and stuffed animals for sale. The inside is very flowery and cute!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by! We will have special events coming up!
reviews_data.review_text: Very happy with my first visit, I’ll definitely be back

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting! Glad you enjoyed the shop! We will have holiday drinks coming soon!
reviews_data.review_text: The owner is always sweet and helps me figure out what we would like. The store has cute gadgets and cute little displays.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for trying our catering platters! Let us know if you would like to book!
reviews_data.review_text:
Trendy boba shop with lots to offer. I was able to try the grilled pork banh mi, fresh rolls and Vietnamese coffee. All were great - definitely craving again as I’m writing this. They’re setting up claw machines soon and also bringing in the Labubus!
Check this place out if you’re in the mood for boba, coffee, ice cream, sweets, Vietnamese food, or a just a good time.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting! Glad you enjoyed the drinks! We have holiday drinks coming soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
If you’re in Gastonia area, give RnR cafe a visit! It’s such a cute spot with a HUGE selection of desserts and drinks. They’ve also expanded their menu to include food, with more in the works!

The drinks we had today (brown sugar float, strawberry lemonade, COCONUT MATCHA 🍵, rose tea something) were all delicious. My son said there were loads of toppings which he happily gobbled down and his friend gave his float 10/10!

I am obsessed with their fresh spring rolls and chicken rice (com ga hoi an), it’s so good!

The owner was sweet and patient while my party changed their order every other minute. She mentioned that they are putting in a couple of claw machines soon. I cannot wait to come back to try more item on the menu!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the review! We have new holiday drinks coming up!
reviews_data.review_text: very nice

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you and your son enjoyed the spot! We will have new flavors soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I brought my son here for a sweet treat and he LOVED it! Valerie was very professional and friendly. The boba tea was delicious and so was the ice cream. Would highly recommend that people try this local gem!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the review here and on yelp! Have you tried our magic lemonade? It is very refreshing post workout!
reviews_data.review_text:
We stopped in today to grab a smoothie after our workout, and I’m so glad we did! 💪🏼🍹

As we pulled up, we recognized the building from a previous business, but curiosity got the best of us—and we decided to check it out. So glad we did!

We had the pleasure of meeting the owner, Valerie, who was so sweet 💖 The service was genuinely perfect—warm, welcoming, and made us feel right at home.

I ordered the Superberry Smoothie 🍓🫐 with oat milk 🥛, added avocado 🥑, and skipped the blueberries. It was so good—super refreshing and exactly what I needed after our workout.

My husband went with the Mango Mellow Smoothie 🥭 with coconut milk 🥥. He downed it so fast 😂 I took a sip, and wow—the natural coconut milk added the perfect hint of sweetness. So tropical and delicious!

We’ll definitely be back, especially for more smoothies—and I can’t wait to try the boba one day! 🧋

While chatting with Valerie, I mentioned how much I loved the atmosphere. The space is incredibly inviting—the seating is comfortable and perfect for relaxing with a smoothie without feeling rushed. There’s also an adorable photo op spot with a flower wall 🌸📸—I can totally picture myself getting dolled up in a cute dress just to take photos there!

Valerie mentioned this was just a soft opening, and the official grand opening will be on July 4th 🎆—with Labubu making an appearance! 🐾 It’s so exciting to see small businesses like this one opening their doors, creating a sense of community, and showing they truly care about their customers.

I’m genuinely excited to watch this adorable small business grow and thrive 🌟💫

reviews_data.owner_answer: We have new flavors for the macaroni! Hope to see all again!
reviews_data.review_text: Coffee was amazing, there were options for the kids too, and they loved it. We tried the danish, berry cake, and macaroons, no complaints, they didn’t even make it out the door it was so good! Will be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for stopping by! Hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful place and friendly staff.  The coffee and white chocolate Raspberry ice cream was amazing.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the positive feedback! We are glad you had a great experience with us! Hope to see you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Absolutely lovely place, great atmosphere for hanging out with friends, studying, or just chilling. Barista was extremely nice, and the coffee is amazing. I recommend the latte! Good music as well, though I suppose taht is a matter of taste. I will definitely be back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Ashley, we are not seeing any order placed under your name. What simple boba drink did you order? We can remake it for you free of charge when you come in.
reviews_data.review_text: I placed my order online, expecting it to be ready when I arrived. But when I got to the location, I waited outside for 15 minutes before going in, only to find out that the girl working there didn’t even know there was an online order. She didn’t start making it until I walked in and told her. In total, it took 30 minutes to get a simple boba drink—which is honestly longer than it takes to get a full meal at a restaurant. And there were no other customers, so there was no excuse for the delay. On top of that, the drink had only six boba pearls and was mostly foam. For what I paid, that’s just unacceptable.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Christopher, thanks for trying our Vietnamese coffee. It is strong and sweet. We can custom make your drink to your liking. We have 20+ flavors and 8+ types of milk to choose from. Hope to see you back for new flavors!
reviews_data.review_text: The coffee drink was super super sweet, and it took way longer than I expected. With a few tweaks, I think this place could turn in to something special.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you enjoyed your visit and the treats! We have more coming! :)
reviews_data.review_text: Cute! Love how everything is pink, and I love how much variety the menu has. 😁 The little bakery treats are so bomb 💣 💥😛

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you and hope to see you back for our new flavors!
reviews_data.review_text: I love the boba ther is so good and delicious 😋

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you enjoyed your visit!
reviews_data.review_text: Cute little coffe shop

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you got to try the ube taro milk tea! We have many other flavors to try as well!
reviews_data.review_text: Ordered a custom milk tea with ube taro and boba and it was super tasty!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by! Glad you enjoyed the cheesecake!
reviews_data.review_text:
R&R Cafe and Gifts is an absolute gem! From the moment you step inside, you’re greeted by a beautifully curated floral aesthetic that adds such a cozy and inviting touch. The menu offers plenty of options, and I love that you can customize your own desserts and drinks to suit your taste.

I had the fully loaded berry cheesecake, which was the perfect balance—“not too sweet” yet still a delightful treat for a Saturday morning. The staff was incredibly patient and friendly, making the experience even better. Since they are currently in their preopening phase, I’m excited to see how they evolve.

Highly recommend stopping by for a sweet escape!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting our shop. We will have more products coming. Stay tuned!
reviews_data.review_text: Overall, this is my new favorite boba spot! Great drinks, friendly service, and a cozy atmosphere. Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you! Glad you enjoyed the dessert and drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious dessert! Best drink in town so far! Love it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you have enjoyed your dine in experience with us. We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Delicious drink and dessert:) so yummy and price is very good too.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the recommendation! We hope to have more offerings in the future to accomodate the needs of our customers. Thank you for the review!
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful cafe with such a large menu selection! The detail in everything from the menu items to interior design and the owner is friendly and passionate in her business, def recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting! We have more surprises coming up!
reviews_data.review_text: Great new shop serving coffee, boba tea, milk shakes, ice cream, and pastries, and so much more. They have unique flavors for a curious foodie. Cute shop and the owner is very nice and helpful.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad your family like all the treats! We will have more coming!
reviews_data.review_text: I took my wife/kids for sweets/coffee. Coffee yummylicous. Sweets treats hit the spot🤤😋 delicious.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for trying out our drinks. We can also make that into a coffee float or boba float! They're delicious!
reviews_data.review_text: Love the Vietnamese coffee and Thai Tea.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the recommendation. Glad you like the coffee and smoothie! We have added more to our menu in the photos section!
reviews_data.review_text: Cute small business with great service and drinks/desserts. It seems to be new, so I would expect to be a little patient while they get everything up and running. Got the coffee and smoothie. Would recommend both.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting our shop. We hope you enjoyed all the pinkness!
reviews_data.review_text:
Absolutely love this new spot! 🌸 at the first glance, I was amazed by the beautiful pink flower decor - it creates such a cozy and elegant vibe. The drinks are top notch! I tried their Vietnamese coffee and it was so rich and flavorful, definitely will order it again next time.
The staff is super friendly and welcoming, though they are soft opening but I can see they’re trying their best, making my whole experience even better.
Highly recommend 🌸🌸🌸

reviews_data.review_text:
Trendy boba shop with lots to offer. I was able to try the grilled pork banh mi, fresh rolls and Vietnamese coffee. All were great - definitely craving again as I’m writing this. They’re setting up claw machines soon and also bringing in the Labubus!
Check this place out if you’re in the mood for boba, coffee, ice cream, sweets, Vietnamese food, or a just a good time.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting! Glad you enjoyed the drinks! We have holiday drinks coming soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
If you’re in Gastonia area, give RnR cafe a visit! It’s such a cute spot with a HUGE selection of desserts and drinks. They’ve also expanded their menu to include food, with more in the works!

The drinks we had today (brown sugar float, strawberry lemonade, COCONUT MATCHA 🍵, rose tea something) were all delicious. My son said there were loads of toppings which he happily gobbled down and his friend gave his float 10/10!

I am obsessed with their fresh spring rolls and chicken rice (com ga hoi an), it’s so good!

The owner was sweet and patient while my party changed their order every other minute. She mentioned that they are putting in a couple of claw machines soon. I cannot wait to come back to try more item on the menu!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the review! We have new holiday drinks coming up!
reviews_data.review_text: very nice

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you and your son enjoyed the spot! We will have new flavors soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I brought my son here for a sweet treat and he LOVED it! Valerie was very professional and friendly. The boba tea was delicious and so was the ice cream. Would highly recommend that people try this local gem!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the review here and on yelp! Have you tried our magic lemonade? It is very refreshing post workout!
reviews_data.review_text:
We stopped in today to grab a smoothie after our workout, and I’m so glad we did! 💪🏼🍹

As we pulled up, we recognized the building from a previous business, but curiosity got the best of us—and we decided to check it out. So glad we did!

We had the pleasure of meeting the owner, Valerie, who was so sweet 💖 The service was genuinely perfect—warm, welcoming, and made us feel right at home.

I ordered the Superberry Smoothie 🍓🫐 with oat milk 🥛, added avocado 🥑, and skipped the blueberries. It was so good—super refreshing and exactly what I needed after our workout.

My husband went with the Mango Mellow Smoothie 🥭 with coconut milk 🥥. He downed it so fast 😂 I took a sip, and wow—the natural coconut milk added the perfect hint of sweetness. So tropical and delicious!

We’ll definitely be back, especially for more smoothies—and I can’t wait to try the boba one day! 🧋

While chatting with Valerie, I mentioned how much I loved the atmosphere. The space is incredibly inviting—the seating is comfortable and perfect for relaxing with a smoothie without feeling rushed. There’s also an adorable photo op spot with a flower wall 🌸📸—I can totally picture myself getting dolled up in a cute dress just to take photos there!

Valerie mentioned this was just a soft opening, and the official grand opening will be on July 4th 🎆—with Labubu making an appearance! 🐾 It’s so exciting to see small businesses like this one opening their doors, creating a sense of community, and showing they truly care about their customers.

I’m genuinely excited to watch this adorable small business grow and thrive 🌟💫

reviews_data.owner_answer: We have new flavors for the macaroni! Hope to see all again!
reviews_data.review_text: Coffee was amazing, there were options for the kids too, and they loved it. We tried the danish, berry cake, and macaroons, no complaints, they didn’t even make it out the door it was so good! Will be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for stopping by! Hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful place and friendly staff.  The coffee and white chocolate Raspberry ice cream was amazing.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the positive feedback! We are glad you had a great experience with us! Hope to see you back!
reviews_data.review_text: Absolutely lovely place, great atmosphere for hanging out with friends, studying, or just chilling. Barista was extremely nice, and the coffee is amazing. I recommend the latte! Good music as well, though I suppose taht is a matter of taste. I will definitely be back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Ashley, we are not seeing any order placed under your name. What simple boba drink did you order? We can remake it for you free of charge when you come in.
reviews_data.review_text: I placed my order online, expecting it to be ready when I arrived. But when I got to the location, I waited outside for 15 minutes before going in, only to find out that the girl working there didn’t even know there was an online order. She didn’t start making it until I walked in and told her. In total, it took 30 minutes to get a simple boba drink—which is honestly longer than it takes to get a full meal at a restaurant. And there were no other customers, so there was no excuse for the delay. On top of that, the drink had only six boba pearls and was mostly foam. For what I paid, that’s just unacceptable.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Christopher, thanks for trying our Vietnamese coffee. It is strong and sweet. We can custom make your drink to your liking. We have 20+ flavors and 8+ types of milk to choose from. Hope to see you back for new flavors!
reviews_data.review_text: The coffee drink was super super sweet, and it took way longer than I expected. With a few tweaks, I think this place could turn in to something special.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you enjoyed your visit and the treats! We have more coming! :)
reviews_data.review_text: Cute! Love how everything is pink, and I love how much variety the menu has. 😁 The little bakery treats are so bomb 💣 💥😛

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you and hope to see you back for our new flavors!
reviews_data.review_text: I love the boba ther is so good and delicious 😋

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you enjoyed your visit!
reviews_data.review_text: Cute little coffe shop

reviews_data.owner_answer: Glad you got to try the ube taro milk tea! We have many other flavors to try as well!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for stopping by! Glad you enjoyed the cheesecake!
reviews_data.review_text:
R&R Cafe and Gifts is an absolute gem! From the moment you step inside, you’re greeted by a beautifully curated floral aesthetic that adds such a cozy and inviting touch. The menu offers plenty of options, and I love that you can customize your own desserts and drinks to suit your taste.

I had the fully loaded berry cheesecake, which was the perfect balance—“not too sweet” yet still a delightful treat for a Saturday morning. The staff was incredibly patient and friendly, making the experience even better. Since they are currently in their preopening phase, I’m excited to see how they evolve.

Highly recommend stopping by for a sweet escape!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting our shop. We will have more products coming. Stay tuned!
reviews_data.review_text: Overall, this is my new favorite boba spot! Great drinks, friendly service, and a cozy atmosphere. Highly recommend!

reviews_data.review_text: Delicious dessert! Best drink in town so far! Love it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting our shop. We hope you enjoyed all the pinkness!
reviews_data.review_text:
Absolutely love this new spot! 🌸 at the first glance, I was amazed by the beautiful pink flower decor - it creates such a cozy and elegant vibe. The drinks are top notch! I tried their Vietnamese coffee and it was so rich and flavorful, definitely will order it again next time.
The staff is super friendly and welcoming, though they are soft opening but I can see they’re trying their best, making my whole experience even better.
Highly recommend 🌸🌸🌸
